description_long: This is a rectangular wooden picnic table with a robust, rustic design, featuring a thick plank tabletop and sturdy legs. The tabletop is composed of several wooden boards arranged side by side, with visible grain and knots that add to its natural appearance. The support structure includes two wide legs at each end, connected by a horizontal crossbeam and diagonal braces for added stability. The table lacks attached benches, making it suitable for use with separate seating. The wood appears to be stained a deep brown, giving it a weather-resistant finish suitable for outdoor environments. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden picnic table with a plank-style top and strong cross-braced legs, finished in deep brown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and the cross-braced support structure beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the crossbeam and diagonal braces clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the table's length and solid construction.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by two wide end legs connected by a horizontal crossbeam and diagonal braces, forming a stable and rigid base.
